title: Core Components of a Blockchain
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental elements that make up a blockchain's structure and how they interconnect.
relationships: Blocks are linked sequentially via their Previous Hash pointers, forming a chain
Transactions are grouped and stored within Blocks
Each Block contains a unique Hash of its own data and the Previous Hash
The Distributed Ledger is a copy of the blockchain held and updated by each Node
Nodes use a Consensus Mechanism to agree on the validity of new Blocks and the state of the Ledger
